narrative: USD mixed as Fed's patient policy stance weighs on rate hike expectations — EUR/USD holds at 1.1799; GBP/USD consolidating near 1.3565. USD/JPY firms to 158.98 on higher US yields, while AUD/USD extends gains to 0.7147. Gold lower -0.19% on subdued safe-haven demand amid steady equities +0.17% and VIX at 17.8.
